mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM auction_list_view WHERE auction_is_deleted = 'N'
AND UPPER(item_category_code) LIKE UPPER(CONCAT('%', #{categoryCode}, '%'))
AND ( auction_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR item_category_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY auction_regdate DESC
SELECT * FROM auction_detail_view WHERE auction_idx = #{auctionIdx} AND auction_is_deleted = 'N'

SELECT a.auction_idx, a.buyer_idx, a.auction_end_at, a.auction_status_idx, COUNT(b.bid_idx) AS b_count FROM auction a LEFT JOIN bid b ON a.auction_idx = b.auction_idx AND b.bid_status_idx != 5 WHERE a.auction_status_idx = 1 AND a.auction_end_at < NOW() AND a.auction_is_deleted = 'N' GROUP BY a.auction_idx, a.buyer_idx, a.auction_end_at, a.auction_status_idx
mapper.update: UPDATE auction SET auction_is_deleted = 'Y', auction_status_idx = 6, auction_deldate = NOW() WHERE auction_idx = #{auctionIdx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auction ( buyer_idx, item_category_idx, auction_thumbnail_img, auction_title, auction_desc, auction_target_price, auction_start_at, auction_end_at, auction_decision_deadline, auction_status_idx, auction_regdate ) VALUES ( #{buyerIdx}, #{itemCategoryIdx}, #{auctionThumbnailImg}, #{auctionTitle}, #{auctionDesc}, #{auctionTargetPrice}, NOW(), #{auctionEndAt}, #{auctionDecisionDeadline}, 1, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE auction SET auction_title = #{auctionTitle}, auction_desc = #{auctionDesc}, auction_target_price = #{auctionTargetPrice}, auction_end_at = #{auctionEndAt}, auction_decision_deadline = #{auctionDecisionDeadline}, auction_moddate = NOW() WHERE auction_idx = #{auctionIdx} AND buyer_idx = #{buyerIdx} AND auction_status_idx = 1 AND auction_is_deleted = 'N'
